caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is recorded in a studio setting against a dark, textured acoustic foam wall. He is wearing a white t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones. A professional silver microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him; the arm features the text "Rode PSA1". Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking, with his facial expressions shifting slightly as he talks. In the initial frames, he looks forward and slightly to the side with his arms mostly out of view. As the clip progresses, he begins to gesture with his hands, bringing his right hand into the frame to emphasize his points. His tattoos are partially visible on his right arm. The camera remains static, maintaining a close-up shot of the man as he interacts with someone off-screen.
